summary_context: Optimized daily reports database reads and query indexing. Added collection group indexes for dailyReports collection in firestore.indexes.json. Refactored submitDailyReport overlap check to query only the specified date instead of the entire collection group. Optimized GET /tasks/reports-all and GET /tasks/backlog by using collectionGroup date-range queries instead of in-memory filtering and N+1 loop queries. Consolidated reports detail backend endpoints to GET /:id/reports/:date returning main, site, and support reports in a single combined payload, reducing frontend HTTP requests from 3 to 1.
